# PlantPal - Epic Breakdown

## Overview

Breakdown of PlantPal PRD into implementable epics and stories.

## Epic 1: User Authentication

Enable users to create accounts and log in.

### Story 1.1: User Registration

As a new user, I want to create an account.

### Story 1.2: User Login

As a returning user, I want to log in.

## Epic 2: Plant Management

Core plant tracking functionality.

### Story 2.1: Add Plant

As a user, I want to add plants to my collection.
